seo.defaultTitle: SkyRH — Modern HR & payroll for teams everywhere
seo.description: Run your whole people cycle — payroll, time off, hiring, performance and an employee self-service portal — on one platform, with compliance localized to your country.

hero.title: Modern HR and payroll for teams everywhere
hero.lead: Run your whole people cycle — payroll, time off, hiring, performance and an employee self-service portal — on one platform, with compliance localized to your country.

modulesPage.heading: Modules built for HR teams
modulesPage.sub: Modular by design — start with what you need, add the rest as you grow.

pricingPage.heading: Simple pricing, per employee
pricingPage.sub: Every plan includes a 14-day trial. Billed per active employee, prorated.
pricingPage.selectModules: Pick the modules you need — required dependencies are added automatically.

companyPage.title: Building HR that works everywhere
companyPage.lead: SkyRH makes modern, compliant HR & payroll accessible to every company — wherever they operate.
companyPage.missionBody: Too many teams still juggle spreadsheets and country-specific rules. We bring the whole people cycle onto one platform and build compliance in — so HR can focus on people, not paperwork.

values.title: Compliance first
values.desc: Local rules built into the product and kept up to date — not bolted on.

values.title: Close to the field
values.desc: Built with HR, finance and managers, for the way teams really work.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: Clear workflows and self-service that everyone actually adopts.

values.title: Security
values.desc: Fine-grained access, audit trails and privacy for sensitive data.

companyPage.careersBody: We hire people who want real impact on how companies manage their teams — engineering, payroll compliance, customer success and sales.
companyPage.contactBody: Customer, partner or future teammate — we'd love to hear from you.
companyPage.ecosystemLead: SkyRH is a platform and an ecosystem — deploy it your way, and grow with partners.
companyPage.ecoPlatformDesc: Cloud, your own infrastructure or standalone — at scale, with a full audit trail.
companyPage.ecoPartnersDesc: Resell, implement or refer — and manage your clients from one console.

resourcesPage.title: Everything to get started and go further
resourcesPage.lead: Documentation, guides and help — built from the product itself.

items.title: Documentation
items.desc: Guides for every module, from setup to daily use.

legalPage.draft: Draft — to be finalized with legal counsel before launch.
legalPage.body: This page is a placeholder. The final version will be published here before launch. For any question in the meantime, please reach out via the contact page.

platformPage.title: Built to run anywhere, at scale, with confidence
platformPage.lead: SkyRH adapts to how your company operates — where your data lives, how fast you grow, and the controls you answer to.

pillars.title: Flexible deployment
pillars.desc: Managed cloud, your own infrastructure, or fully standalone — keep your data where the law and your rules require.

pillars.title: Performance at scale
pillars.desc: A parallelized payroll engine computes thousands of payslips in minutes, not hours.

pillars.title: Security & traceability
pillars.desc: Fine-grained access, a complete audit trail and observability over every action.

platformPage.modesLead: The same product, delivered the way your organization needs it.

modes.title: Cloud
modes.desc: We host and operate it. Up and running in minutes, updates included.

modes.title: On-premise
modes.desc: Runs on your own servers or private cloud, behind your firewall.

modes.title: Standalone
modes.desc: A self-contained package for fully offline or air-gapped environments.

platformPage.ctaBody: Tell us how your teams work and where your data needs to live.

partnersPage.title: Grow your business with SkyRH
partnersPage.lead: Resell, implement or refer modern HR & payroll — and manage all your clients from one operator console.

types.title: Reseller
types.desc: Sell SkyRH under your own brand, set your margin and own the relationship.

types.title: Implementation partner
types.desc: Deploy, localize and configure SkyRH for your clients' countries and rules.

types.title: Referral
types.desc: Send us business and earn a commission on every account you bring.

partnersPage.consoleTitle: One console to run all your clients
partnersPage.consoleBody: Harmony, the operator console, gives partners a single place to manage every tenant they serve.
consolePoints: Assign plans and modules, track billing & MRR
partnersPage.ctaBody: Join our reseller and implementation network — we'll get you set up.

signupPage.title: Create your workspace
signupPage.planLead: You can change this anytime. Billed per active employee.
signupPage.accountLead: You'll be the first administrator — we'll email a link to activate it.
signupPage.reviewLead: Check everything looks right before we set things up.
signupPage.successBody: We've recorded your workspace request. Check your inbox to activate it and set your password.

confirm.title: Set your password
confirm.lead: Choose a password to activate your workspace and sign in.
confirm.hint: At least 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, a digit and a symbol.
confirm.weak: Password needs 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, a digit and a symbol.
confirm.successBody: You can now sign in and invite your team.

loginPage.title: Sign in
loginPage.lead: Manage your subscription, products and invoices.

partnerPage.title: Partner area
partnerPage.subtitle: Your referrals, leads and commissions.
partnerPage.notPartner: You're not enrolled in the partner program yet. Contact us to join.

accountPage.title: My account
accountPage.subtitle: Subscription & billing
accountPage.payDisabled: Card payments aren't enabled for your workspace yet.
accountPage.payError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
accountPage.orderPendingLead: Pay this invoice to activate your access.
accountPage.payThanks: Payment received — your access is being activated.
accountPage.refNotPartner: You're not enrolled in the referral program yet. Contact us to become a partner.
accountPage.delImpact: Closing stops renewal: your access stays active until the end of the current term, then the workspace is closed and data deleted per our retention policy. The final invoice remains due.

features.heading: Everything your HR team needs
features.sub: From hire to retire — modular, and connected end to end.

payroll.title: Payroll & payslips
payroll.desc: Full monthly cycle with country-localized compliance.

attendance.title: Time off & attendance
attendance.desc: Leave, schedules, holidays and team calendar.

records.title: Employee records
records.desc: One source of truth for people and contracts.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.desc: From open role to hire, with a talent pool.

career.title: Performance & career
career.desc: Goals, review campaigns and skills mapping.

selfservice.title: Employee self-service
selfservice.desc: Payslips, requests and time off, on any device.

ctaBand.title: Ready to modernize your HR?
ctaBand.sub: Start a 14-day free trial — set up your workspace in minutes.

footer.tagline: Modern HR & payroll, on one platform, with compliance localized to your country.
